title: Failed parameter type override in class

features.name: class with parameterized type default
features.description: Code should include a class declaration with a type parameter that has a default type specified

features.name: type parameter override in class instantiation
features.description: Code should include a class instantiation with a type parameter override that differs from the default

features.name: enum type as type parameter value
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef used as a type parameter value in class definition
features.snippet:
typedef enum { FOO_0, FOO_1 } foo_e;
typedef enum { BAR_0, BAR_1 } bar_e;

features.name: static function using type parameter from class
features.description: Code should include a static class function that uses the type parameter to declare variables and call type-specific methods
